use_cases: Animate headlines and hero text with staggered vertical cut reveals on page load or scroll
Create engaging entrance animations for emphasized text content in landing pages
Add interactive text reveal effects triggered by user clicks in portfolios and presentations
Display animated testimonials or quotes with character-level staggered effects
Build scroll-triggered text animations for storytelling and narrative content sections
ai_summary: A Framer Motion-based text animation component that reveals content through a vertical cut effect with configurable splitting by words, characters, or lines. Supports staggered timing, spring-based physics animations, click/scroll triggers, and exposed refs for programmatic control. Designed as a reusable utility for creating engaging text entrance animations in hero sections, landing pages, and storytelling layouts.
